name: Major Campaign Match Countdown
description: Daily countdown content for upcoming Major Campaign matches. Builds excitement with decreasing day count and CL-specific branding.
guidelines: Large countdown number as the central visual element on the CL navy background. Starball animation orbiting the number. Include both club crests and match details. Use Instagram countdown sticker in the designated zone. Post daily starting 5 days before a CL match. Each day can feature a different CL memory or fact alongside the countdown.
